structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-11-19 Nevada Housing to Release Essential Workers Program
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-11-19 08:35:11-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The Nevada Housing Division will launch the Worker Advantage Program on December 1st, 2025, designed specifically for Nevada’s essential workers. Offering substantial down payment assistance, the program supports those who contribute to the most critical services in our communities. See below for details. 

 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EhJNAzggGfFHoJanFR4Z2agB74fxwDy_b8bkeoWSUtVcng?e=CvMErI> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EhM-DjUePlFJnXjAUBDnl5IBN_aKu43tXKSL7NZin-ktmQ?e=TTa7op> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	$20k in Down Payment Assistance
*	0% interest, no payments, 30-year deferred second mortgage
*	Funds can be used for down payment and/or rate buy-down

	*	Borrower may pay discount points equal to 2% or 4% of the principal loan amount to permanently buy down the rate.
	*	Remaining funds can be used toward down payment or closing costs

*	Up to 150% AMI permitted
*	Available to FTHB and repeat buyers

	*	Homebuyer Education <https://www.ehousingplus.com/wp-content/uploads/NHD-HBE-11-18-25.pdf>  is required.

*	Borrower must have been a Nevada resident for at least six months prior to the reservation. 

 



*PRR = permanent rate reduction

 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	The essential workers categories include teachers and school support staff, public safety employees, construction laborers, and healthcare workers. For specific details please reference the attached document. 

	*	For questions regarding occupations not listed, contact the Product Department.

*	Funds are available on a first come, first served basis. 
*	This offering is a subset of the Home is Possible program- please utilize the HIP templates and CM codes (CFBNV30, FFBNV30, VFBNV30, UFBNV30).

	*	A separate Encompass file is not required for the DPA.

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Program Compliance Information (includes addendum specifying permitted occupations).  
*	Marketing
*	Program AMI Limits

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
